## Summary

Completes the `/workbench-v2` cockpit transition as a focused UI/layout delta.

This PR makes `ReviseCockpitClient` the real active cockpit implementation instead of a thin facade over `ReviseQueueV2Client`.

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECK EXACTLY ONE — Pass 2 pre-checked as default):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [x] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files:

- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClient.tsx`
- `.github/pr-bodies/PR-846.md`

In scope:

- compact 56px cockpit top bar
- filters moved into left queue rail
- independently scrollable queue
- independently scrollable center decision surface
- direct buttons: Accept A, Accept B, Accept C, Keep Original, Reject, Defer, Write Custom
- Revision Ledger moved into collapsible footer drawer
- decision sync to `/api/revision-ledger` preserved
- metadata payload preserved: sourceExcerpt, sourceLocation, criterion, severity, scope, queueType, opportunitySource, evidenceStatus
- auto-advance after decision preserved

Out of scope:

- evaluation architecture changes
- TrustedPath changes
- `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` writer ownership changes
- data-pipeline changes
- branding redesign

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- UI-only change concentrated in the active `/workbench-v2` client.
- Main risk is viewport behavior on smaller laptop screens; acceptance test remains 1366x768.
- No new background job or evaluation pipeline path is introduced.

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: no

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

## Contract Integrity

- `accepted_story_ledger_v1` authority is unchanged.
- `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` writer ownership is unchanged.
- Revise decisions still persist through `revision_ledger_decisions` via `/api/revision-ledger`.
- No workbench page-load ledger writer is introduced.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

- Evidence remains visible in the center panel.
- Diagnosis and repair logic remain accessible through tabs.
- Direct A/B/C buttons reduce author decision friction without changing recommendation generation.
- No manuscript re-diagnosis is introduced.

## Tests

Required before merge:

- `npm run build`
- authenticated `/workbench-v2` smoke check
- 1366x768 cockpit viewport check
- Accept A/B/C, Keep, Reject, Defer, and Write Custom decision persistence check
